Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: A restaurant that uses the virtual queue system.

ownerUid.description: The UID of the restaurant owner.

lastTokenNumber.description: The last token number assigned today.

lastTokenDate.description: The date when the last token was assigned (YYYY-MM-DD).

averageWaitTimePerCustomer.description: The estimated wait time per customer in minutes.

paymentExpiryDate.description: When the current payment period expires.

QueueEntry.title: Queue Entry
QueueEntry.description: A customer entry in a restaurant's queue.

customerPhone.description: The phone number of the customer.

members.description: The number of members in the group (e.g., '1', '2', ..., '9+').

tokenNumber.description: The token number assigned to the customer.

status.description: The status of the customer in the queue.

createdAt.description: When the customer joined the queue.

/restaurants/{restaurantId}/queue/{queue.description: Subcollection of queue entries for a specific restaurant.
